Title: Haier Smart Home, 디지털 조달·공급망 통합으로 마진 개선
Summary: Haier Home은 2024년 매출 2,859.8억 위안, 순이익 187.4억 위안으로 전년 대비 각각 4.29%, 12.92% 성장했고, 매출총이익률을 27.8%로 0.3%p 개선했다고 공시했습니다. 경영진은 원자재 가격 안정과 함께 디지털 조달·R&D·생산·판매 연계, 그리고 정저우 컴프레서 공장(연 224만대)·정저우·충칭 내제화(연 530만장)를 포함한 공급망 통합이 국내외 마진 개선의 핵심 요인이라고 명시했습니다. 시사점: Haier는 핵심 부품 내제화와 디지털 조달·생산 연계를 결합해 글로벌 평균 이상 속도로 원가를 낮추고 있어, 중장기적으로 프리미엄·중저가 양쪽에서 마진 격차를 벌릴 수 있습니다. 액션: ① Haier의 컴프레서·PCB 내제화 수준을 기준으로 우리 DA 주요 부품(컴프레서, 모터, PCB)의 ‘내제화 vs 외주’ 중장기 전략 재점검 ② 우리/Haier의 최근 3년 매출총이익률 트렌드 비교를 통해 원가 절감 속도 벤치마킹 ③ 조달·생산·영업 데이터를 하나로 묶는 DA 전용 ‘디지털 조달 대시보드’ 추진 (우선순위: 상, 기한: 2026-06-30).
Title_en: Haier Smart Home Improves Margins Through Digital Procurement and Supply Chain Integration
Summary_en: Haier Smart Home announced that it would achieve 2024 revenue of CNY 285.98 billion and net profit of CNY 18.74 billion, representing year-on-year growth of 4.29% and 12.92%, respectively, and a gross profit margin of 27.8%, a 0.3 percentage point improvement. Management stated that stabilizing raw material prices, digital procurement, R&D, production, and sales integration, and supply chain integration, including the Zhengzhou compressor plant (annual production of 2.24 million units) and the in-house PCB production in Zhengzhou and Chongqing (annual production of 5.3 million PCBs), were key factors in improving domestic and international margins. Implications: Haier is reducing costs at a faster rate than the global average by combining the in-house production of core components with digital procurement and production integration, which should lead to improved profitability in the mid- to long-term. We can widen the margin gap between premium and mid- to low-end segments. qxb-pdf-osscache.qixin Actions: ① Re-evaluate our mid- to long-term strategy of "in-house vs. outsourcing" for our DA's key components (compressors, motors, PCBs) based on Haier's level of in-house production of compressors and PCBs. ② Benchmark the pace of cost reduction by comparing our and Haier's gross profit margin trends over the past three years. ③ Promote a proof-of-concept (PoC) for a DA-specific "digital procurement dashboard" that integrates procurement, production, and sales data. (Priority: High, Deadline: 2026-06-30).qxb-pdf-osscache.qixin
Tag_en: Haier, supply chain integration, digital procurement, gross margin, compressors, PCBs, cost reduction, global
